milestones.name: Runtime Spine
milestones.objective: 稳定 root SDK defaults、runtime identity、message/event/step/export/import/checkpoint/resume 基础契约，让 graph 可以在稳定 step 边界恢复。

milestones.name: Model Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 provider-neutral model contract、provider registry/router、route set、fallback decision、middleware、fake provider 和 OpenAI-compatible reference adapter。
open_items: 真实 OpenAI/Anthropic provider adapter 作为外部 gopact-adapters-model 仓库优先目标；OpenAI-compatible generic adapter 继续通过 provider profile 覆盖 GLM/BigModel、Z.AI、Volcengine Ark、Alibaba DashScope/Model Studio、OpenRouter 和企业网关；models.dev catalog adapter 可作为能力/价格/上下文窗口 hint，但不能替代真实 conformance
生产级 provider 健康检查、预算策略和评测治理继续由 adapter/plugin 深化

milestones.name: Tool and Sandbox Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 visible/deferred tool registry、artifact、sandbox、policy、tool middleware、retry/effect/replay 和 verification evidence 第一片。
open_items: tools.CommitStore / WithReplayCommitStore replay commit ledger 第一片已落地；外部 commit store adapter 可复用的 gopacttest/toolconformance helper 已覆盖 missing load、context cancellation、invalid record、first-write-wins、input immutability 和 load defensive copy；生产级 tool exactly-once ledger 持久化、外部 commit store adapter 实现、跨 worker 冲突处理仍需在 adapter 或宿主 worker 中实现

root SecretRef / SecretProvider / SecretValue secret provider 原子契约已具备第一片，NewPolicySecretProvider secret resolve policy wrapper 已覆盖 PolicyBoundarySecret / PolicyActionResolve 授权、deny 不调用底层 provider、review 转 approval interrupt、policy event 不携带 raw secret；root PromptInjectionGuardMiddleware 已覆盖宿主注入 detector、PolicyBoundaryModel / PolicyActionInspect 授权 finding 摘要、deny 不调用底层 model、review 转 approval interrupt、policy event 不携带 raw prompt；gopacttest/secretconformance helper 已覆盖 provider presence、canceled context、invalid ref、fixture resolve、SecretValue redaction 和 byte-copy；gopacttest/promptinjectionconformance helper 已覆盖 detector presence、canceled context、clean/risky fixture、finding 完整性、request immutability 和 raw payload leak；sandbox.Profile / sandbox.ProfileManager fail-closed profile wrapper 已覆盖 allowed commands、read/write path、env key 和 resource limit 的 SDK 原子边界；生产级 sandbox profile 后端、复杂 secret 继承授权模型、prompt-injection classifier 具体实现和策略调参仍需继续深化

milestones.name: Integration and Extensibility Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 memory、skill、MCP、A2A、TurnLoop、middleware、plugin、channel/transfer、policy/redaction 和外部集成路线第一片。
open_items: MCP/A2A production transport、Lark 真实 client/OAuth、A2UI renderer、AG-UI WebSocket/plugin 仍在外部仓库路线中
真实 LangSmith SDK、LangGraph exporter policy/redaction 深化和插件级治理仍需外部 plugin/adapter 完成

milestones.name: Agent Template and Evidence Layer
milestones.objective: 在原子能力之上验证 ReAct、Agent-as-Tool、Dev Agent template contract、trajectory golden、verification evidence、entropy audit 和 reviewer/release gate。
open_items: self-bootstrap workflow release evidence 真实场景仍需扩展；release bundle conformance helper 已覆盖具体 CI gate requirement、release_bundle evidence metadata 对齐，以及 workflow release parent summary 与 bundle process 的 task/gate/resume/review/count 对齐，workflow process conformance helper 已覆盖 workflow parent/child link、workflow parent input action_count、child task id 唯一性、child task input/output 的 mode/action/status/reason_count 对齐、action order、failed/interrupted/canceled summary、required input source、workflow output 与 child summary 的 mode/action/action_status/reason_count 以及 input/intervention count、release child summary 的 release gate input id / resume input id / review intervention id 对账、input/intervention metadata、合法 action index、boundary workflow_task_id 与 mode/action/action_status 对齐、resume metadata 与 ResumeRequest 对齐、release action 的 release gate input 与 approved/rejected/pending review intervention 对账、allowed release 必须 resolved approval、rejected release 必须 rejected review boundary、interrupted release 必须 requested approval boundary 和 patch raw diff 不泄漏，action governance metadata 贯穿 process/workflow 边界，ReviewDecision.Metadata 中的 review prompt/eval/policy ref 已进入 review intervention metadata 且不能覆盖 reviewer/review_status/source/resume 等 canonical 字段，BuildReleaseBundle 已要求 process review intervention 中的 review prompt/eval/policy ref 与 reviewer decision 同名同值，BuildProcessRecords 已支持 ActionInterrupted + pending interrupt，把等待人工 approval 的 release gate 记录为 TaskInterrupted、pending release gate input 和 InterventionRequested approval request，也可把 pending apply approval 记录为 TaskInterrupted、devagent.patch input 和 InterventionRequested approval request；BuildProcessRecords 也已支持 ActionCanceled，把外部 context canceled / 用户取消记录为 TaskCanceled，BuildWorkflowProcessRecords 已可对重复 action kind 的 child task id 追加稳定 workflow_action_index 消歧，并单独汇总 interrupted_action_count / canceled_action_count，workflow process conformance 已可拒绝导入/恢复记录里的重复 child task id，WorkflowRecordsFromRunExport 已可从 RunExport 恢复 workflow parent/child/input/intervention process records，按 workflow_action_index 恢复顺序，并在返回前复用 workflow process conformance 拒绝非一致记录，WorkflowActionProcessRecords 已可按 workflow_action_index 提取单个 child action 的 process records，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExport 已可从 RunExport 直接恢复并按 action index 提取单个 child action process records，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsByAction / WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExportByAction 已可按唯一 action kind 提取单个 child action process records，并在重复 action kind 时要求调用方用 action index 或 child task id 消歧，WorkflowActionProcessRecordsByTaskID / WorkflowActionProcessRecordsFromRunExportByTaskID 已可按 child task id 提取单个 child action process records，ImportProcessRecords / ImportWorkflowRecords 已可把恢复后的 process/workflow records 校验并防御性写回 RunRecorder，RunRecorder 已固定 RunExport 顶层只汇总 run-scope stable identity（user/session/thread/run/agent/app/trace）并拒绝漂移，CallID / ParentCallID 保留为调用级 event/process identity，形成 step 级 export/import 再封存闭环，BuildReleaseBundle 已拒绝 workflow child process records 混入其他 workflow_action_index 的 input/intervention 边界，template trajectory conformance 已覆盖 runtime identity consistency 和 required frame metadata 子集匹配，Dev Agent self-bootstrap golden trajectory 的 required frames 已固定 action/mode metadata，ReAct 普通 multi-tool-then-final、多 tool-error 与 verifier passed report、tool artifact result、step export artifact import、checkpoint artifact import golden trajectory、A2A agent card discovery golden trajectory、Agent-as-Tool local child run / local child failure / remote A2A send success / remote A2A stream / remote A2A stream unsupported / remote A2A stream failure / remote A2A stream canceled / remote A2A authenticated send / remote A2A authenticated send failure / remote A2A authenticated stream / remote A2A authenticated stream unsupported / remote A2A authenticated stream terminal failed/canceled / remote A2A authenticated cancel / remote A2A authenticated cancel failure / remote A2A auth policy event metadata contract / remote A2A send terminal auth audit metadata contract / remote A2A stream terminal auth audit metadata contract / remote A2A cancel auth audit metadata contract / remote A2A send failure / remote A2A send timeout / remote A2A send policy deny / remote A2A send policy review / remote A2A stream policy deny / remote A2A stream policy review / remote A2A cancel success / remote A2A cancel failure / remote A2A cancel policy deny / remote A2A cancel policy review golden trajectory、A2A policy review approval interrupt id 已按 PolicyRequest.Action 追加 :a2a:<action> 消歧，send/stream/cancel 分别固定为 :a2a:send / :a2a:stream / :a2a:cancel、Dev Agent rejected/interrupted/canceled workflow child summary（含 reason_count / interrupted_action_count / canceled_action_count）场景、Dev Agent 重复 action task id 消歧场景、Dev Agent workflow conformance 拒绝重复 child task id 场景、self-bootstrap release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap apply release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap interrupted apply golden trajectory、self-bootstrap rejected apply golden trajectory、self-bootstrap canceled apply golden trajectory、self-bootstrap rejected release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap interrupted release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap canceled release golden trajectory、self-bootstrap resumed release golden trajectory 和 self-bootstrap resumed apply release golden trajectory 已覆盖；self-bootstrap rejected/interrupted/canceled/resumed release、interrupted/rejected/canceled apply 与 resumed apply release 真实场景已把 workflow process records 写入 RunExport，并从 export 反取后通过 workflow process conformance，且 rejected/canceled apply restored workflow parent/action summary 已有 compact golden snapshot；更多 template-specific golden trajectory tests 和更广 Dev Agent workflow process record 场景仍需扩展

ReAct memory worker 单次 pass、本地内存 DeferredMemoryWorkQueue、本地 visibility timeout reference、外部 durable queue 可复用的基础/visibility conformance helper（含 retry metadata preservation、terminal transition input immutability）、并发 Dequeue 不重复分发同一 job 的 conformance contract、默认有界 retry/backoff decider、worker 默认 decider 接线、worker executor、统一 worker recorder 可同时记录 pass memory_replay 和 retry/stop/dead-letter 调度 evidence、细粒度 pass/schedule recorder、RunOnce lease gate / pass-local lease renewal token fencing、release 幂等清理、有界 drain loop 和 retry/stop/dead-letter 调度决策 evidence 已具备；durable 生产队列 adapter、distributed queue leasing、并发调度、生产级调度策略、真实 retry/DLQ storage 和更高级 memory 压缩/合并策略仍需 template adapter 或宿主 harness 实现

GitHub Actions run/job/step JSON -> CIRun parser、远端 CI run/job/step 已观察结果 -> ci_gate evidence 桥接，以及多仓远端 CI run set -> 单个跨仓 ci_gate check 聚合已具备第一片，ci_gate suite/run/run set 已暴露非保留补充 metadata key summary 并保护 canonical CI 字段；model review prompt/eval/policy governance metadata required-field gate 和 canonical adapter/purpose metadata hardening 已具备第一片；channel-backed human review canonical adapter/channel/event/action metadata hardening 已具备第一片；release gate check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary 与 canonical gate field hardening 已具备第一片；release bundle check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary、ReviewDecision.Metadata 中 review prompt/eval/policy ref 的 canonical evidence 提升与防伪、process review intervention 与 reviewer decision 的 governance ref 对账，以及 canonical bundle field hardening 已具备第一片；root run export check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary 与 canonical run export field hardening 已具备第一片；root model call check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、request/response metadata key summary 与 canonical model field hardening 已具备第一片；root tool call check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、result metadata key summary 与 canonical tool field hardening 已具备第一片；root review/failure attribution check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary 与 canonical review/failure field hardening 已具备第一片；root channel event check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation 与 canonical channel/event/action metadata hardening 已具备第一片；root policy decision request/policy metadata key summary hardening 已具备第一片；root effect replay / run effect replay check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary 与 canonical replay field hardening 已具备第一片；root entropy audit check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation、metadata key summary 与 canonical entropy field hardening 已具备第一片；memory replay 和 memory work schedule（均含 planned/result step id）、checkpoint record、checkpoint objectstore index、sandbox exec、command、diff 和 file snapshot check/evidence metadata non-reserved preservation 与 canonical field hardening 已具备第一片，memory replay、memory work schedule、checkpoint record、checkpoint objectstore index、sandbox exec、command、diff 和 file snapshot 已暴露非保留补充 metadata key summary；更完整 model review 真实评测治理、CI provider 拉取/重跑/secret 治理和人工 release gate 仍需生产化

milestones.name: Production Hardening
milestones.objective: 让 core SDK、public API、schema、CI、release gate、文档、迁移策略和外部扩展仓库达到可长期依赖的状态。

evidence_records.notes: GitHub Actions run 28345830731 completed successfully on main for test: harden provider roadmap targets; run steps Check whitespace, Test, Race, Vet, Lint, Coverage, Examples, and Security were all success.

Remote audit shows ready=11 / not_ready=0 / missing=0: all 11 private external scaffold repositories exist, remain private, have CI workflows, have GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN configured, and their latest ci workflow runs completed successfully. The -remote-status-json gate now reports the passed ready state, internal/extensionscaffold.RecordRemoteStatusCheck and -remote-status-evidence-json emit passed external_repository_readiness evidence, and internal/extensionscaffold.RecordRemoteCIRunSetCheck plus -remote-ci-evidence-json emit the external-ci:gopact-ai cross-repository ci_gate check required by release automation.

open_items: 外部仓库 scaffold、sync-plan、sync-repos 脚本、sync-secrets 脚本、rerun-ci 脚本、本地 -verify、-plan-rerun-sh、-remote-status-json、-remote-status-evidence-json 和 -remote-ci-evidence-json 远端审计已统一绑定 manifest required CI commands；sync-repos.sh 对已存在仓库会先 clone 远端历史、覆盖生成的 scaffold 文件，再用 GOWORK=off go mod tidy 生成远端可用 go.sum 并 push；2026-06-26 已真实创建并推送 11 个 gopact-ai 私有外部 scaffold 仓库，主仓已推送 v0.0.0 tag，外部仓库均已补充 go.sum 和私有 SDK 读取 workflow；2026-06-27 已用 repeat-safe sync-repos.sh 重新同步 11 个外部仓库并逐仓库通过本地 git diff --check、go test -count=1 ./... 和 go vet ./...；remote audit 显示仓库存在、私有且 CI workflow 文件存在，并能直接审计 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN secret；-remote-status-json 已把 ready gate 收敛为仓库存在、visibility 匹配、CI workflow 存在、GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN 存在和最新 CI 通过，并在未 ready 时输出 not_ready_count / blocking_reasons / required_actions，RecordRemoteStatusCheck 与 -remote-status-evidence-json 已能把该已观察报告写成 external_repository_readiness verification evidence，RecordRemoteCIRunSetCheck 与 -remote-ci-evidence-json 已能把最新 Actions run 写成 external-ci:gopact-ai 跨仓 ci_gate verification evidence；2026-06-29 11:43 +08:00 remote audit 显示 ready=11 / not_ready=0 / missing=0，11 个外部仓库均已配置 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN 且最新 GitHub Actions ci run 均为 success；2026-06-29 12:06 +08:00 gopact-adapters-model 已在 07edc0efb1bfed57e67da28331c3347b0b8e2ddb 接管 openaicompatible 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 12:27 +08:00 gopact-templates-devagent 已在 7ba23ebce5dc90f9065ee6bdb5fe3c8b1a2462fc 接管 gitdiff 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 12:48 +08:00 gopact-templates-devagent 已在 518ea787bac5deb354a30c5907cf61529f8aeacd 接管 cireview 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 13:02 +08:00 gopact-templates-devagent 已在 da65fc532ddfa85c21b22e592c109bf13e79d108 接管 channelreview 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 13:17 +08:00 gopact-templates-devagent 已在 608d93ad1aca34278c5fa759a113270acb6a5d4a 接管 modelreview 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 13:35 +08:00 gopact-adapters-checkpoint 已在 6fa3b5eb74e332c6f79bfdf27b48333a0a585910 接管 checkpoint sqlstore 源码并通过外部 CI；2026-06-29 13:49 +08:00 gopact-adapters-checkpoint 已在 57efe8fe1eb42a9059222a2b11e52cf635fb55bc 接管 checkpoint redisstore 源码并通过外部 CI；M6 外部仓库 readiness blocker 已解除，但 M6 仍需继续完成 v1 migration plan 中其余实际外迁、稳定、降级或删除

v1-migration-plan.json 已把所有需要外迁的主仓路径和 transitional root API group 绑定到 v1 前处理动作、目标仓库或目标状态和 release_gate_checks；release_gate_checks 已逐个声明 evidence type、来源 manifest、required_check_ids、required status 和 blocker summary，core-ci-gates 用 required_ci_gates 对齐 core-ci-gates.json，external-repository-readiness 也要求 external-ci:gopact-ai 跨仓 ci_gate check 覆盖 whitespace / unit / vet；gopacttest.RequireVerificationEvidenceRequirements 和 TestV1MigrationReleaseGateChecksDriveSDKReleaseGateRequirements 已证明这些 gate requirement 可直接进入 SDK verification conformance、Dev Agent release gate 和 ReleaseBundle；adapters/model/openaicompatible、adapters/devagent/gitdiff、adapters/devagent/cireview、adapters/devagent/channelreview、adapters/devagent/modelreview、adapters/checkpoint/sqlstore 与 adapters/checkpoint/redisstore 已记录 external_source_ref 并从 core 删除；v1 前仍需按该清单真正外迁、稳定、降级或删除其余对应实现

required_gates: human or reviewer decision before release
